title: scirpus crinitus
intro: Scirpus crinitus, also known as woolly club rush, is a type of perennial plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Scirpus crinitus include reducing inflammation and relieving coughs, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Scirpus crinitus is often prepared for medicinal use in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the root and rhizome being the primary parts used for extraction.
